art_nouveau.name: Art Nouveau Botanical
art_nouveau.visual: Art Nouveau illustration, flowing organic curves, ornate botanical borders, flat color fills with ink linework, gilt accents
art_nouveau.video_reinforce: hand-drawn ink outlines visible, flat color fills, no photographic textures in background, ornamental botanical borders
art_nouveau.avoid: No photorealistic textures on illustrated elements

impressionist.name: Impressionist Painterly
impressionist.visual: Impressionist oil painting, visible brushstrokes, Monet-inspired, soft painterly atmosphere, impasto texture
impressionist.video_reinforce: visible brushstrokes throughout, oil painting texture, no digital smoothing, painterly color blending
impressionist.avoid: No sharp edges or digital smoothing in painted world

line_art.name: Line-Art Botanical
line_art.visual: ink line-art illustration, clean outlines, flat color fills, botanical precision, Studio Ghibli aesthetic
line_art.video_reinforce: clean ink outlines visible, flat color fills, hand-drawn line quality, no photographic shadows in background
line_art.avoid: No photorealistic shadows on line-art elements

comic.name: Comic Panel / Storybook
comic.visual: comic illustration, bold outlines, flat color blocks, sequential art panels, storybook aesthetic
comic.video_reinforce: bold outlines visible, flat color blocks, no smooth gradients in background, storybook illustration quality
comic.avoid: No smooth gradients -- flat fills only in illustrated areas

watercolor.name: Watercolor
watercolor.visual: watercolor illustration, soft wet edges, color bleeding and pooling, translucent washes on textured paper, visible paper grain
watercolor.video_reinforce: watercolor wash texture visible, soft bleeding edges, paper grain texture, no hard digital edges in background
watercolor.avoid: No hard edges or solid fills on illustrated elements -- all edges should bleed softly

art_deco.name: Art Deco
art_deco.visual: Art Deco illustration, geometric patterns, bold symmetry, metallic gold and silver accents, angular forms, sunburst motifs, 1920s glamour
art_deco.video_reinforce: geometric patterns visible, sharp angular forms, metallic accents, no organic softness in background architecture
art_deco.avoid: No organic or flowing forms in architectural elements -- keep geometry sharp and angular

ukiyoe.name: Ukiyo-e (Japanese Woodblock)
ukiyoe.visual: Ukiyo-e woodblock print, flat color planes, bold flowing outlines, Hokusai-inspired nature motifs, limited color palette, wave and cloud patterns
ukiyoe.video_reinforce: flat color planes visible, bold outlines, woodblock print texture, no photographic gradients in background
ukiyoe.avoid: No photographic gradients or 3D shading -- flat color planes only in illustrated areas

chinese_ink.name: Chinese Ink Wash (Shanshui)
chinese_ink.visual: Chinese ink wash painting, ink gradients from dense black to pale grey, calligraphic brushstrokes, mountain-water landscape, intentional negative space, rice paper texture
chinese_ink.video_reinforce: ink wash gradients visible, calligraphic brush quality, rice paper texture, no solid fills or hard outlines in background
chinese_ink.avoid: No solid flat fills or hard geometric edges -- all forms defined by ink gradients and brushwork

pop_art.name: Pop Art
pop_art.visual: Pop Art illustration, bold primary colors, Ben-Day dots, high contrast, thick black outlines, Warhol/Lichtenstein graphic style
pop_art.video_reinforce: Ben-Day dot patterns visible, bold flat primary colors, thick black outlines, no subtle gradients in background
pop_art.avoid: No subtle color gradients or muted tones -- bold saturated primaries and high contrast only

paper_cut.name: Paper Cut / Collage
paper_cut.visual: paper cut collage illustration, layered paper textures, visible cut edges with slight shadow, torn and cut paper shapes, Matisse-inspired organic forms
paper_cut.video_reinforce: paper texture visible, layered cut edges with shadows between layers, no smooth digital surfaces in background
paper_cut.avoid: No smooth digital surfaces -- all background elements should show paper texture and cut edges

storyboard_tpl: A single image containing exactly 3 columns and 3 rows of {panel_ratio} panels in {style} style. Each panel is a vertical portrait frame. The 9 panels tell one consecutive visual story reading left-to-right top-to-bottom. The final panel (bottom-right) should feel like a resolved ending — settled, calm, visually complete. {panel_descriptions}. Thin white borders separating all 9 panels. CRITICAL: No panel titles, no captions, no decorative text, no typographic overlays anywhere in any panel — purely visual storytelling with no added words. The photographic product's own printed label and logo are part of the product and must remain visible and legible. {avoid}.
keyframe_start_tpl: Place the attached product photo into a {style} illustrated world. Product stays photographic. {world}. {comp}. {color}. {avoid}.
keyframe_end_tpl: Place the attached product photo into a {style} illustrated world. Product stays photographic. Same camera angle as the reference image. {world_end}. {comp_end}. {color}. {avoid}.
keyframe_tpl: Place the attached product photo into a {style} illustrated world. Product stays photographic. {world}. {comp}. {color}. {avoid}.
motion_i2v_tpl: {moment}. Animate the scene shown in the input image. {motion}. {product_directive}. {camera}.
storyboard_video_tpl: Animate this scene as the opening of a 9-panel illustrated storyboard (shown in the reference image). Follow the storyboard left-to-right, top-to-bottom: {narrative}. {style} style. {ambient_motion}.
motion_tpl: {style} illustrated world, {video_reinforce}. MAINTAIN {camera_angle} camera angle throughout. Product at {product_scale} of frame, {product_position}. {color_constraint}. {motion}. Product bottle remains photographic with sharp glass reflections and readable text. {camera}.
